message:
fix(fj-lax): handle negative axis in Cumsum/Cumprod

Parse axis as i64 and convert negative indices (e.g., -1 for last axis)
to positive values before use, matching JAX/NumPy semantics. Adds 15
oracle tests for Cumsum/Cumprod validating 1D/2D operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
